title: Frequency as Belonging
html: Stub. Founding image from 2022 01 07 failure is terrifying and humiliating it means not fittting: outsiders cluster wherever the "frequency" matches — "Is it Silicon Valley, is it in jail. Different kinds of people." Belonging is felt as a "massive bass behind you thumping" — a somatic, low-end resonance, not a visible sign. Recurs in spirit across Austin, China chapter, and am I a concept doubts. Promote when next mention surfaces.
